title_en: Survey synthesizes simulators and internal world models for embodied AI
title_zh: 综述整合具身 AI 中的模拟器与内部世界模型
description_en: A survey organizes how simulation platforms and world models jointly shape embodied intelligence research.
description_zh: 一篇综述系统整理了仿真平台与世界模型如何共同塑造具身智能研究。
why_it_matters: It gives the field a more mature map of embodied world-model research and deployment challenges.
